news_items.headline: Raleigh hits game-winner, Crawford makes 3B debut in returns from IL
Shohei's solo shot proves to be the difference in pitchers' duel
A’s Squander Chances, Fall to Pirates in Series Equalizer
Dbacks and Kelly Thud Yet Again: Dbacks 0, Angels 7
news_items.summary: The Dbacks dropped the second game of the series against the Angels Tuesday night 7-0. The offense had absolutely nothing and Merrill Kelly got lit once again. Tonight marked the team’s 7th shutout loss of the season. Merrill Kelly did not have anything today as he gave up 6 ER in 5.1 innings. He allowed […]

news_items.headline: Justin Verlander to pitch for Tigers at Comerica Park on Sunday against White Sox
news_items.summary: Verlander, the oldest active player in the major leagues at 43, was put on the injured list with left hip inflammation in April.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani and Justin Wrobleski team up to lead Dodgers over Rays
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani homers for the game's only run, and Justin Wrobleski pitches six shutout innings as Dodgers beat the Rays.

news_items.headline: Short but not sweet: Rays 0, Dodgers 1
news_items.summary: The Rays hoped to even the series after a tough one-run loss against the Dodgers last night. And they had their best on the mound to make it happen, as Drew Rasmussen took the ball for tonight’s game. Coming into the contest, he had pitched a combined 14 scoreless innings in his last two starts. […]

news_items.headline: Mariners activate Raleigh and Crawford but put Arozarena on 10-day injured list
news_items.summary: The Big Dumper is back with the Seattle Mariners, and they’re ready for him to make a big difference.

news_items.headline: Mets lose ABS challenges early vs. Reds, leads to missed opportunity and Carlos Mendoza's ejection
news_items.summary: The Mets lost two ABS challenges early in Tuesday's eventual loss to the Reds and manager Carlos Mendoza spoke about his team's approach.
